LIPSON REPRESENTED TO THE COURT THAT THERE'S AN ASSOCIATION OF COUNSEL THAT WAS SUBMITTED AND THAT HE IS CO-COUNSEL FOR DEFENDANT EUROPEAN COLLISION CENTER LLC. MOREOVER, THE MOTION, WHICH IS BROUGHT ON THE EVE OF TRIAL, IS DEFECTIVE BECAUSE MOVANT DID NOT COMPLY WITH SF LOCAL RULE 8.2(A)(2)(A) AND COORDINATE A HEARING DATE. JUDGE: RICHARD B.
